messages: I'll arrive at Cairo airport around
Send me your policy before confirming the stay please

السلام عليكم
انا عايز احجز الشقه وانا أصلا موجود في نفس المكان في عمارة ١١ 

بس أنا حاخد تقريبا أسبوع من ٦ إلى ١٢
Thank you very much for your prompt reply. Looking forward to our stay.

Hi Omar, 
Thank you for your message. Will be checking in after 10.30pm. 
Where or how would you like me to send you the passport details?
In here through messages?

Hi Omar, hope all is well. 
Can I please check if this apartment has a balcony or not? Also, is there a safe deposit box? 

Thank you.

Thank you for your prompt reply. 

The balcony is not an issue at all. We just wanted to check. 

The safe box, we're normally used to it, to leave our passports & electronic devices. Any of your other available apartments has one? I would be happy to check it out if possible. Thank you
Changing to the other apartment. It looks like it is in a higher level. Still booking with you though. Thank you
